.gitignore.general_idea: Explicitly allow the Maven wrapper JAR to be tracked in version control to ensure build reproducibility.
Ignore application log directories to prevent committing runtime artifacts.
Ignore environment configuration files to prevent leaking secrets or local settings.
Remove NetBeans-specific ignore patterns as the project likely no longer uses or supports NetBeans.
Remove explicit WAR file ignore pattern, relying on the general target/ directory exclusion instead.
Reorganize .gitignore with clear section headers and standard ordering for better maintainability.

README.md.general_idea: Update README to reflect the migration from Java Servlets/JSP to Spring Boot 3.2 and ReactJS.
README.md.human_impl: Replaced 'Java (Servlets), Jakarta EE' and 'JSP' with 'Spring Boot 3.2' and 'ReactJS + Vite' in the technology section.

README.md.general_idea: Remove explicit JDK 17 requirement to align with the migration to JDK 21.
README.md.human_impl: Removed the line '* **Java:** JDK 17' from the technical requirements list.

README.md.general_idea: Update build instructions to use Spring Boot specific Maven goals instead of generic package/start.
README.md.human_impl: Changed execution instructions from 'mvn package' and 'start server' to 'mvn spring-boot:run'.

README.md.general_idea: Update documentation to point to Spring Boot application.properties instead of custom Java config class.
README.md.human_impl: Replaced instructions to edit 'config/conexion.java' with instructions to edit 'src/main/resources/application.properties'.

README.md.general_idea: Add setup instructions for the new ReactJS frontend client.
README.md.human_impl: Added section 'Configuración del Frontend (ReactJS)' with npm install and npm run dev commands.

README.md.general_idea: Document the new REST API endpoints and authentication flow.
README.md.human_impl: Added 'Endpoints del Backend' section listing POST /api/auth/login, GET /api/empleados, etc.

README.md.general_idea: Document the new directory structure reflecting the separation of backend and frontend.
README.md.human_impl: Added ASCII tree diagram showing 'sisnom-springboot/', 'client/', and 'src/' directories.
